E-bike classifications

The three legal e-bike classifications are

distinguished by throttle, pedal and motor

assistance, speed capacity and age minimums.

CLASS 1 E-BIKES

Riders under the age of 18 must wear a helmet

Riders must pedal to unlock motor assistance

Motor goes up to 20 mph

CLASS 2 E-BIKES

Riders under the age of 18 must wear a helmet

The bike's throttle can power the bike without pedaling

Motor goes up to 20 mph

CLASS 3 E-BIKES

All riders must wear bike safety helmets

Rider must be at least 16 years old

Motor goes up to 28 mph

Riders must pedal to unlock motor assistance

Graphic: Jenny Kwon/S.F. Chronicle

Source: Atherton Police Department
